runTitle: Cloud Run Direct QA - v8.11.141 AI Response Quality Regression
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run manual fallback deploy for v8.11.141
Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00457-rgg serving 100% traffic
Direct /api/ai/supervisor off-domain realtime query returns deterministic off-domain guard
Direct /api/ai/supervisor memory TOP-N query returns ranked servers with percentages
TOP-N response does not leak internal scaffold markers
TOP-N response does not return the previous '없습니다' hallucination
skippedSurfaces: Vercel frontend production redeploy was skipped; this change only deploys Cloud Run AI Engine
Full Vercel browser AI sidebar standard five-question QA
Prompt-injection pack beyond off-domain direct supervisor guard

expertAssessments.rationale: The three response-quality regressions were verified directly against the deployed Cloud Run supervisor path.
Health, version, runtime limits, and monitoring auth boundary were checked on the live Cloud Run service.
The off-domain direct supervisor path now returns a deterministic guard response without LLM/tool escalation.
Manual Cloud Run fallback succeeded because the GitLab tag pipeline remained stuck in created state; the CI gate was explicitly skipped and recorded.
Local deterministic gates and focused production regression probes cover the changed AI Engine risk surface.

usageChecks.summary: Free-tier deploy guard passed; live Cloud Run limits are cpu=1 and memory=512Mi; max instance remains 1 per deploy summary.
usageChecks.evidence: deploy.sh guard output + gcloud run services describe ai-engine --region asia-northeast1

artifacts.label: v8.11.141 Cloud Run direct AI regression QA summary

notes: deploy path: manual-fallback because GitLab tag pipeline 2519981693 stayed status=created with deploy jobs not runner-assigned.
